ai_summary: Based on reviews, created with AI Most reviewers were unhappy with their experience overall. Many people were dissatisfied with the company's customer service, describing it as unhelpful and unresponsive to issues, particularly regarding billing. Consumers frequently encountered problems with unexpected charges, difficulty canceling subscriptions, and a lack of transparency in payment practices, leading to frustration. The product itself was often criticized for being buggy, slow, and overly complicated, making basic tasks difficult and time-consuming. However, some customers also noted that the product has a great core functionality, praising its flexibility, organization capabilities, and ability to sync across devices. A few other people also felt that the tool is useful for project management and team collaboration, finding it intuitive once learned.See more ###
